arts.ttl: Arsenal plot summer move for 21-year-old wide player who rejected Barcelona
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly keen on signing the Espanyol right back Omar El Hilali. The 21-year-old has been quite impressive in La Liga and his performances have attracted the attention of the North London club according to a report from the Sun. The player has previously admitted to rejecting Barcelona and it will be interesting to […] The post Arsenal plot summer move for 21-year-old wide player who rejected Barcelona appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer problem explained by Enzo Maresca after Arsenal vs Chelsea shock
arts.sum: The England international and Chelsea's star man was not selected for the fixture on Sunday afternoon between the Premier League pair at the Emirates

arts.ttl: Why Cole Palmer is missing from Chelsea squad against Arsenal today
arts.sum: Chelsea’s star man is not involved in this afternoon’s London derby at the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Cole Palmer OUT of Arsenal vs Chelsea
arts.sum: Chelsea face Arsenal at the Emirates on Sunday but the Blues will be without star man Cole Palmer, as they search for a win to boost their Champions League hopes

arts.ttl: Chelsea planning to sell Axel Disasi in the summer transfer window
arts.sum: According to Fabrizio Romano, Chelsea are planning to sell Axel Disasi (27) during the summer transfer window. The Premier League club have drafted a list of between 7 and 8 players…

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Chelsea LIVE on Sky & highlights!
arts.sum: "Since we started, the idea was not to change keeper," added Maresca. Robert Sanchez will start in goal for Chelsea on Sunday against Arsenal .

arts.ttl: Back to Chelsea? Romano announces Joao Felix transfer decision
arts.sum: AC Milan have no intention to sign Joao Felix permanently from Chelsea, according to Fabrizio Romano. Loan spells at Chelsea and Barcelona did not work out - despite the occasional signs of promise - nor did a permanent move to Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea drop multiple team news hints for Arsenal as huge Reece James decision made
arts.sum: and a number of their players - have dropped early team news hints for this afternoon's London derby against Arsenal in the Premier League. Manchester City's draw with Brighton on Saturday means the west Londoners can move four points clear in the Champions League qualification spots.
